across.clue: A casino is a place where people go to gamble.
to speak to someone about something for the first time especially in order to ask for help or make an offer.
A janitor is a person who makes repairs and takes care of a building.
A necklace is a piece of jewelry that people wear around their necks.
To regret something is to wish that it hadn’t happened.
Merchandise is goods ready to be purchased or sold.
someone who is legally responsible for another person such as a child whose parents have died
a translation of what people are saying in a foreign language film or television programme that appears at the bottom of the screen.
To inspect is to look at something carefully.
to use natural resources such as trees water or oil so that you gain as much as possible.

down.clue: Vintage wine is excellent in quality and was made several years ago.
To purchase means to buy something.
To navigate something is to control the way it moves or goes.
To legislate means to make laws.
To replenish something means to make it full or complete again.
A conference is a formal meeting for discussion.
To aspire means to have a strong desire to achieve or do something.

If someone is neutral, then they do not help either of the two fighting sides.
